message:
refactor: use --env flag instead of env.sh file

Replace the env.sh file approach with an --env flag that outputs
export statements directly. This simplifies shell integration by
using `eval "$(llm-proxy --env)"` instead of sourcing a separate file.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
